reviews.review_description: I'm going to try the app. The issue I have is that I buy gift cards for meta quest games and sometimes really cool immersive games are free with subscriptions that I can purchase after a free demo. But those only accept Quest cash which is accesed through Google play or PayPal. Making the fun of Meta Quest gift cards hit a brick wall sometimes. I was refunded something on this app for like $4.99 I'm not sure why or what if it was my purchase of the game or an add on. And it said per my request. Nylar suit people am I right.
